book.title: The New Dawn
book.premise: A speculative fiction saga about humanity's first interstellar colony and the mysteries they uncover.

chapter.title: Arrival
chapter.section_goal: Establish the setting and introduce the main characters.

constraints: Total manuscript must not exceed 130,000 words.
All chapters must maintain consistent POV perspective.
Setting descriptions must align with the 'cinematic' tone requirement.
Character introductions in Chapter 1 must be complete and distinct.
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 1 word count is between 1,300 and 1,500 words.
Chapter 1 contains at least 3 distinct character introductions.
Chapter 1 establishes the interstellar colony setting with sensory details.
No plot holes or unresolved character motivations in Chapter 1.
Resource tracker at /home/daravenrk/dragonlair/book_project/resource_tracker.json reflects 1400 words written for Chapter 1.
WebUI state at /home/daravenrk/dragonlair/book_project/webui_state.json confirms Chapter 1 completion status.
